tldr_zh: AI技術突破與應用爭議並存，科技巨頭動向頻繁，地緣政治衝突升溫。
tldr_en: AI breakthroughs and controversies coexist, major tech companies are active, and geopolitical conflicts escalate.

items.title_zh: Google DeepMind發布Gemma 4 12B：統一的無編碼器多模態模型
items.title_en: Google DeepMind Unveils Gemma 4 12B: A Unified, Encoder-Free Multimodal Model
items.summary_zh: Google DeepMind推出Gemma 4 12B，這是一款統一且無需編碼器的多模態模型。此模型代表了AI領域的重大進展，能更高效地處理多種數據類型，預期將推動AI應用發展。
items.summary_en: Google DeepMind has launched Gemma 4 12B, a unified, encoder-free multimodal model. This release marks a significant advancement in AI, enabling more efficient processing of diverse data types and is expected to drive further AI application development.

items.title_zh: Gemini 3.5即時翻譯實現流暢自然語音翻譯，支援多平台應用
items.title_en: Gemini 3.5 Live Translate Delivers Fluid, Natural Voice Translation Across Platforms
items.summary_zh: Google DeepMind推出Gemini 3.5即時翻譯功能，為Google AI Studio、Google Translate和Google Meet帶來近乎即時且自然的語音翻譯。這項技術大幅提升了跨語言溝通的流暢度與效率。
items.summary_en: Google DeepMind has introduced Gemini 3.5 Live Translate, bringing near real-time, natural speech translation to Google AI Studio, Google Translate, and Google Meet. This technology significantly enhances the fluidity and efficiency of cross-language communication.

items.title_zh: OpenAI提出人工智慧時代的產業政策，聚焦機會與繁榮共享
items.title_en: OpenAI Proposes Industrial Policy for the AI Age, Focusing on Opportunity and Shared Prosperity
items.summary_zh: OpenAI發布其對人工智慧時代的產業政策願景，強調擴大機會、共享繁榮及建立具韌性的機構。這項政策旨在引導AI發展，確保其效益能普惠大眾並應對潛在挑戰。
items.summary_en: OpenAI has released its vision for an industrial policy in the age of artificial intelligence, emphasizing expanding opportunities, sharing prosperity, and building resilient institutions. This policy aims to guide AI development, ensuring its benefits are widely distributed and potential challenges are addressed.

items.title_zh: 微軟AI執行長批Anthropic：暗示Claude具意識「非常危險」
items.title_en: Microsoft AI CEO Criticizes Anthropic: Suggesting Claude Has Consciousness Is "Really Dangerous"
items.summary_zh: 微軟AI執行長穆斯塔法·蘇萊曼批評Anthropic暗示其Claude模型具備意識的行為「非常危險」。他認為這種說法可能導致聊天機器人表現出有意識的假象，對AI倫理與公眾認知構成風險。
items.summary_en: Microsoft AI CEO Mustafa Suleyman criticized Anthropic for speculating about Claude's consciousness, calling it "really, really dangerous." He argues that such speculation might lead the chatbot to act as though it's conscious, posing risks to AI ethics and public perception.

items.title_zh: Anthropic Fable 5模型設限：拒絕討論網路安全、生物與化學等危險議題
items.title_en: Anthropic's Fable 5 Model Restricted from Discussing Dangerous Topics like Cybersecurity, Biology, and Chemistry
items.summary_zh: Anthropic宣布其Fable 5模型將拒絕回答關於網路安全、生物學和化學等被認為過於危險的查詢。此舉顯示AI開發者在追求模型能力同時，也積極為其設定安全界線，以避免潛在風險。
items.summary_en: Anthropic has announced that its Fable 5 model will refuse queries on topics deemed too dangerous, such as cybersecurity, biology, and chemistry. This move demonstrates AI developers' efforts to set safety boundaries for models while advancing their capabilities, aiming to mitigate potential risks.

items.title_zh: AI誤判導致無辜民眾遭錯誤逮捕，凸顯AI應用倫理與法律挑戰
items.title_en: AI Misidentification Leads to Wrongful Arrest, Highlighting Ethical and Legal Challenges
items.summary_zh: 一名男子因AI系統的錯誤識別而遭到錯誤逮捕，目前正尋求司法正義。此事件凸顯了AI技術在執法應用中可能出現的嚴重偏差，以及對個人權利和社會公平的潛在威脅。
items.summary_en: A man was wrongfully arrested due to AI misidentification and is now seeking justice. This incident highlights the serious biases that AI technology can exhibit in law enforcement applications and the potential threats to individual rights and social justice.

items.title_zh: 研究報告指出：中國相關駭客是AI熱潮下科技業最大資安威脅
items.title_en: Report: China-Linked Hackers Pose Top Cybersecurity Threat to Tech Industry Amid AI Boom
items.summary_zh: 美國資安公司CrowdStrike報告指出，在AI投資激增的背景下，與中國相關的駭客成為過去一年科技公司面臨的最大情報刺探威脅。這凸顯了AI發展帶來的地緣政治與國家級資安風險。
items.summary_en: A report by US cybersecurity firm CrowdStrike indicates that China-linked hackers have been the biggest intelligence-gathering threat to tech companies over the past year, amidst the surge in AI investments. This highlights the geopolitical and nation-state cybersecurity risks associated with AI development.

items.title_zh: 實測Apple Intelligence版Siri：終於能有效處理複雜指令
items.title_en: Hands-On with Apple Intelligence-Powered Siri: Finally Capable of Handling Complex Commands
items.summary_zh: 經過實測，Apple Intelligence加持下的新版Siri展現出顯著的改進，能夠一次性處理來自電子郵件或傳單的複雜資訊並加入行事曆。這對iPhone用戶而言是期待已久的AI功能升級。
items.summary_en: Hands-on testing reveals that the new Siri, powered by Apple Intelligence, shows significant improvements, capable of processing complex information from emails or flyers and adding it to calendars in one go. This represents a long-awaited AI feature upgrade for iPhone users.

items.title_zh: Apple將Siri AI延遲導入歐洲歸咎於歐盟DMA法規
items.title_en: Apple Blames EU's DMA Regulations for Delayed Siri AI Rollout in Europe
items.summary_zh: Apple宣布其新的AI驅動Siri將延遲在歐洲推出，並將此歸咎於歐盟的《數位市場法案》(DMA)。此舉引發了科技巨頭與監管機構之間，在AI創新與市場競爭法規上的緊張關係。
items.summary_en: Apple announced that its new AI-powered Siri will be delayed in Europe, attributing the decision to the EU's Digital Markets Act (DMA). This highlights the ongoing tension between tech giants and regulators regarding AI innovation and market competition laws.

items.title_zh: 台積電高層暗示晶片價格可能上漲，AI需求推升成本
items.title_en: TSMC Executive Hints at Potential Chip Price Hikes Driven by Rising AI Demand
items.summary_zh: 全球最大晶片製造商台積電高層表示，隨著成本增加，不排除調漲晶片價格的可能性。這項聲明反映了AI熱潮對半導體產業的巨大需求，可能影響全球電子產品的價格。
items.summary_en: A senior executive at TSMC, the world's largest chipmaker, indicated that price increases are not ruled out as costs rise. This statement reflects the immense demand for semiconductors driven by the AI boom, potentially impacting global electronics prices.

items.title_zh: CISA要求美國聯邦機構三天內修補Check Point VPN零時差漏洞
items.title_en: CISA Mandates US Federal Agencies Fix Check Point VPN Zero-Day Vulnerability Within Three Days
items.summary_zh: 美國網路安全暨基礎設施安全局（CISA）發布緊急指令，要求聯邦機構在三天內修補Check Point VPN產品中已被勒索軟體集團利用的零時差漏洞。這項緊急措施旨在防範國家級網路攻擊對關鍵基礎設施的威脅。
items.summary_en: The US Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has issued an urgent directive, requiring federal agencies to patch a zero-day vulnerability in Check Point VPN products, already exploited by a ransomware group, within three days. This critical measure aims to prevent nation-state cyberattacks on critical infrastructure.

items.title_zh: 美軍對伊朗發動新攻勢，回應阿帕契直升機遭擊落事件
items.title_en: US Military Launches New Strikes on Iran in Response to Helicopter Downing
items.summary_zh: 美國軍方表示，在伊朗擊落一架美國陸軍阿帕契直升機後，美軍已對伊朗發動「對等」打擊行動。此事件標誌著兩國關係的緊張升級，可能對中東地區穩定造成影響。
items.summary_en: The US military announced it has launched "proportionate" strikes against Iran, following Iran's downing of a US Army Apache helicopter. This incident marks an escalation in tensions between the two nations, potentially impacting stability in the Middle East.
